usage: loadDrc [-help] <fileName> [-incremental] [-orient {r0 r90 r180 r270 mx mx90 my my90}] [-origin <x> <y>]

options.name: -orient
options.description: {r0 r90 r180 r270 mx mx90 my my90} Rotate all drcs in the file with the orientation

options.name: -origin
options.description: The origin coordinate of the drcs
